title: Three Goodbyes
synopsis: After what seemed like a trivial quarrel, Marta and Antonio break up. Marta reacts to the breakup by closing in on herself. The only symptom she cannot ignore is her sudden lack of appetite. Antonio, a chef on the upswing, throws himself into his work. Yet although he is the one who left Marta, he cannot get over her. When Marta discovers that her lack of appetite has more to do with her own health than the pain of separation, everything changes: the taste of food, the music, the desire, the certainty of the choices she has made.

synopsis_lang.en: After what seemed like a trivial quarrel, Marta and Antonio break up. Marta reacts to the breakup by closing in on herself. The only symptom she cannot ignore is her sudden lack of appetite. Antonio, a chef on the upswing, throws himself into his work. Yet although he is the one who left Marta, he cannot get over her. When Marta discovers that her lack of appetite has more to do with her own health than the pain of separation, everything changes: the taste of food, the music, the desire, the certainty of the choices she has made.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 平淡的歲月流逝無聲，一場微小爭執讓多年戀情告終，瑪塔陷入自我封閉，心底的寂寞難以消化，身體突如其來的噩耗更是欲說無言。走在孤獨的路上，落日餘暉竟攜來了意外的溫暖，驟然照亮了平常忽略的美好景緻。在人生最後的時光，一次次的告別化作和煦的重逢，點滴過往交織成溫潤的詩篇，如果生命總有盡頭，何不以最溫柔的身影，與世界好好說再見。

cast_lang.zh_hk: 艾芭諾宜娃查、艾利奧傑曼諾

subtitle: Chinese,English
